ab: Yabung, cyu su maki sali?
en: Yabung, are you home?

ab: maki, uwah miyuk.
en: Yes, come on in.

ab: Yabung, cyu su maki sali?
en: Yabung, are you home?

ab: ini kaki sali ku Yabung, kinang ga Ipay, kyan lalu yaw su? mwah Yabung lga kyalun mu la.
ch: B:Yabung不在家耶!我是Ipay，有什麼事嗎? 回來我會轉告Yabung。
en: Yabung is not at home. I am Ipay. What can I do for you? I will let him know when he comes back.

ab: ima cimu?
en: Who are you?

ab: uya, cami ga Uma ru Iwan, gyahi blihun.
ch: B:奶奶，我們是Uma和Iwan，幫我們開門。
en: Grandma, we are Uma as and Iwan, please open the door for us.

ab: ima ga?
en: Who is it?

ab: kinang ga Buya, nyu cu mwah hkani Yukan.
en: I am Buya, I am here for Yukan.

ab: uya, nyu cu mwah mita isu.
en: Grandma, I am here to see you.

ab: bsya ci ini su uwah la. lungun misu calay.
ch: A:你好久沒來了，我好想念你。
en: You haven’t been here for a long time. I missed you so much.

ab: Sayun, nyu cu mwah cisan isu.
en: Sayun, I am here to play with you.

ab: nahay uwah miyuk, bsya ci n_gong misu la.
en: Come on in! I have been waiting for you for a long time.

ab: nuhi mu nanak ngahi hani, tlami mani.
ch: A:這是我種的地瓜，吃吃看。
en: This is the sweet potato I grow. Try it!

ab: cbing ci ngahi hani.
en: The sweet potato is so sweet.

ab: uwah! nuhi mu nanak bway nni’un hani, tlami mani.
ch: A:過來!這是我種的水果，吃看看。
en: Come here! These are the fruits I grow. You should try it.

ab: cbing ci bway nni’un hani.
en: The fruit tastes sweet.

ab: tama, nuhi mu tetun hani ini kisi iyu tlami mani.
ch: A:請坐，這是我種的有機玉米吃看看。
en: Take a seat! You should try some organic corn that I grow.

ab: ux, cbing ci tetun hani.
en: Wow! The corn tastes so sweet.

ab: kani su ’cyung?
en: Do you want some oranges?

ab: ini cu thoyay mani ’cyung, kani caku ringgo kinang.
ch: B:我不能吃橘子，我吃蘋果就好。
en: I can’t eat oranges. I will have some apples instead.

ab: kani su pang?
en: Would you want some cookies?

ab: ang, ksli caku ci mani.
en: Sure, I like it very much.

ab: litan maku bway nni’un kni’an misu.
en: Let me peel the fruit for you.

ab: mhway su, piyux ci bu’ nya bway hani.
en: Thank you. This fruit is so juicy.

ab: nbu ’sya.
en: Please drink water.

ab: mhway su!
en: Thank you.

ab: piyux mani, piyux ci nhapuy mu rami.
en: Enjoy yourself. I cooked a lot of dishes.

ab: ux, ble ci sokan ru ble ci ni’un.
en: Oh! It smells good and looks delicious.

ab: piyux mani, nyu piyux nya.
en: Enjoy yourself. There is a lot more.

ab: iyat cu cayux la!
en: I’ll make myself at home then.

ab: piyux mani, nyu piyux nya.
en: Enjoy yourself. There are plenty here.

ab: piyux ci wa mu ni’un la, iyat cu kani la.
ch: B:我吃了好多，不能再吃了。
en: I ate a lot and couldn’t eat any more.
